description: Synthetic SnibeLis ASTM E1394 result upload for MAGLUMI X3: documented ENQ/STX/content/ETX/EOT session ACKs, H/P/O/R/R/L records, ^^^ assay identifiers, raw units and abnormal flags. NOT a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed (LIS-108 / S3.0a); SnibeLis LIS User Manual v1.1 Appendix A Network Interface, result transmission example
source.note: Application payload only. The SnibeLis simulator applies the manual's simplified ENQ/STX/content/ETX/EOT envelope and ACKs ENQ, STX, ETX and EOT. The manual examples omit E1381 frame numbers and checksums; live SnibeLis capture must confirm whether production uses this simplified envelope or full E1381 framing.
